projects.title: Sway (InstaGlam)
projects.description: MERN social platform with JWT + refresh tokens, Google OAuth, OTP verification, real-time chat with Socket.io, follow graph, and a personalised feed. Backend on Render, frontend on Vercel.

projects.title: MelodyHub
projects.description: Music playlist app with JWT-protected REST APIs, MVC backend, and a responsive React UI with context-based state for playlists and tracks.

projects.title: HACA Landing
projects.description: Marketing landing experience built while interning at HACA — focused on clear hierarchy, responsive layout, and fast perceived performance.

projects.title: TaskFlow
projects.description: Focused productivity UI for managing tasks — CRUD flows, optimistic updates, and a clean layout suitable for daily use.

projects.title: Product suite (WIP)
projects.description: A larger in-progress build — architecture and integrations are still being refined; live preview available on request.

blogPosts.title: Shipping MERN apps with confidence
blogPosts.excerpt: Patterns I use for auth, env config, and deployment when taking a MERN stack from localhost to Vercel + Render.

blogPosts.title: Socket.io in real products
blogPosts.excerpt: When to reach for WebSockets, how presence and rooms map to UX, and pitfalls to avoid in your first chat feature.

blogPosts.title: Designing APIs before the UI
blogPosts.excerpt: A short workflow for contract-first endpoints that keep React components thin and predictable.
